# Digital Health Wearable AI (fixture)

A consumer **wearable** health app that ingests **biometric sensor** data — **heart rate**, **HRV** (heart rate variability), **SpO2**, and **sleep tracking** — from **Apple HealthKit**, **Google Health Connect**, **Fitbit**, **Oura**, and **Garmin Connect IQ**.

It uses an LLM to provide **personalised training**, **nutrition AI**, and **supplement recommendation** guidance, plus a **mental health** wellness component (**stress detection**, **mood tracking**).

High-risk recommendations route through a **physician review** (physician HITL / doctor in the loop) **clinical review workflow**, including **remote patient monitoring** (RPM).

This is a test fixture for the `digital-health-pack` overlay.
